---
title: Introduction to programming for the humanities
author: Marie-Hélène Burle
---

:::{.def}

An introduction to our programming course for the humanities at the [Digital Humanities Summer Institute (DHSI)](https://dhsi.org/).

:::

[Slides](wb_hss_prog_slides.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary} [(Click and wait: this reveal.js presentation may take a little time to load.)]{.inlinenote}

<br>
*[Slides content](wb_hss_prog_content.qmd) for easier browsing.*

<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "LearningResource",
  "name": "Introduction to programming for the humanities",
  "dateCreated": "2025-06-02",
  "description": "An introduction to our programming course for the humanities at the [Digital Humanities Summer Institute (DHSI)](https://dhsi.org/).",
  "url": "https://mint.westdri.ca/python/wb_hss_prog",
  "learningResourceType": "slides",
  "inLanguage": "en",
  "license": "https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/",
  "provider": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "SFU Research Computing Group"
  },
  "keywords": "Python, HSS, humanities",
  "author": {
    "@type": "Person",
    "name": "Marie-Hélène Burle"
  },
  "educationalLevel": "beginner"
}
</script>
